intent: On HN, find a Show HN post from today, visit the linked project, and extract the project's one-line description

eval_fallback.criteria: The output must include a Show HN post title (starting with 'Show HN:'), a URL pointing to an external project site, and a one-line description extracted from that project's landing page. The description should be a coherent sentence or phrase that could serve as a tagline or headline.
